reason: Defines the architecture layering rules, package layout, and the 'thin wrapper' principle for internal/app — the core constraint this refactor enforces
Go quality conventions (error handling, naming, test patterns) to follow when creating the three new packages
Error wrapping and propagation patterns — must be preserved when extracting logic into new packages
Guides how to correctly split responsibilities across layers, directly applies to deciding what stays in app/ vs moves to wanmei/fivee/plugingen
Helps avoid inadvertently duplicating logic or creating wrong abstractions during extraction
